steps.title: Explain the toxicity cause
steps.content: The student wants to explain why brine pools are toxic to most sea life. The notes provide the cause: the water is three to eight times saltier than the surrounding ocean, and that extreme saltiness makes it toxic.

steps.title: Reject details without cause
steps.content: B mentions toxicity and the 2022 discovery but not the reason for toxicity. C focuses on bacteria that can survive there. D defines brine pools as salty underwater lakes but does not connect the saltiness to toxicity. The answer is A.
